name: python3-sqlalchemy-utc
title: python3-sqlalchemy-utc
summary: SQLAlchemy type to store timezone aware datetime values
description:
SQLAlchemy type to store timezone aware datetime values
UtcDateTime type is equivalent to the built-in 'DateTime' with
'timezone=True' option enabled on vendors that support 'timestamptz'
e.g. PostgreSQL, but on SQLite or MySQL, it shifts all 'datetime.datetime'
values to UTC offset before store them, and returns timezone aware
'datetime.datetime' values through result sets.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-sqlalchemy-utc because SQLAlchemy type to store timezone aware datetime values.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-sqlalchemy-utc as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-sqlalchemy-utc with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-sqlalchemy-utc --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
